changelog: Fix: Device registration refreshed on every launch — admin Devices list now shows current device immediately
Fix: VPN EPERM fallback now requires SOCKS5 internet probe — no longer marks connected when traffic is not routed
Fix: Protocol fallback (Reality → XHTTP → WebSocket) only declares connected after real browsing probe passes
New: Real Internet Test button in Diagnostics — tests DNS, TCP 443, HTTPS GET, Cloudflare trace, route via VPN
New: VPN connection refused until 1.1.1.1/cdn-cgi/trace returns HTTP 200 through tunnel
Fix: GitHub repository link updated to github.com/XS227/SetaLink everywhere
